title: hedyotis fluviatilis
intro: Hedyotis fluviatilis, also known as river buttonbush, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hedyotis fluviatilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Hedyotis fluviatilis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat various ailments.
